name: SquashAttest
description: Generate and evaluate a CycloneDX + SPDX BOM for an AI/ML model artifact. Runs security scanning, compliance policy checks, optional Sigstore signing, and publishes attestation artifacts to the pipeline run.
helpMarkDown: See [Squash documentation](https://squishai.com/docs/squash) for full policy and configuration reference.
author: Squish AI (squishai)

inputs.name: modelPath
inputs.label: Model path
inputs.helpMarkDown: Path to the model directory or file (relative to the pipeline workspace root, or an absolute path). Supports `$(Build.*)` variables.

inputs.name: policies
inputs.label: Compliance policies
inputs.helpMarkDown: Comma-separated list of policy names to evaluate. Examples: `eu-ai-act`, `nist-ai-rmf`, `fedramp`, `cmmc`, `enterprise-strict`.

inputs.name: sign
inputs.label: Sign BOM via Sigstore
inputs.helpMarkDown: Sign the generated CycloneDX BOM using Sigstore keyless signing. Requires OIDC token availability on the agent.

inputs.name: failOnViolation
inputs.label: Fail on policy violation
inputs.helpMarkDown: Fail the pipeline task if any error-severity policy violation or unsafe security scan is found.

inputs.name: outputDir
inputs.label: Output directory
inputs.helpMarkDown: Directory to write attestation artifacts. Defaults to the model directory. Supports `$(Build.*)` variables.

inputs.name: squishVersion
inputs.label: Squish version
inputs.helpMarkDown: Pin Squish version to install (e.g. `9.0.0`). Leave blank to install the latest release.

inputs.name: pythonExecutable
inputs.label: Python executable
inputs.helpMarkDown: Python binary used to install Squish and run attestation. Use `python` on Windows agents where `python3` is unavailable.

inputs.name: publishArtifacts
inputs.label: Publish attestation artifacts
inputs.helpMarkDown: Upload attestation artifacts (BOM, SPDX, master record) to the pipeline run as downloadable build artifacts.

outputVariables.name: SQUASH_CYCLONEDX_PATH
outputVariables.description: Absolute path to the generated CycloneDX BOM file.

outputVariables.name: SQUASH_SPDX_JSON_PATH
outputVariables.description: Absolute path to the generated SPDX JSON file.

outputVariables.name: SQUASH_MASTER_RECORD_PATH
outputVariables.description: Absolute path to the squash-attest.json master attestation record.
